name: omnigrid-vendor
description: Dev-only tooling. Manages the front-end dependencies (alpinejs, sweetalert2, @tailwindcss/browser). The server never runs npm — it just serves node_modules/ directly via FastAPI's StaticFiles mount at /node_modules/. ESLint is a devDependency for static JS lint feedback (npm run lint). `type: module` lets eslint.config.js use ESM `import` syntax without Node's deprecation warning; the browser-served static JS files don't go through Node so this setting doesn't affect them.
